description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/nda.md to add the two missing required clauses: Governing Law and Return of Materials. All other clauses (Confidentiality, Term, Permitted Disclosures) are left untouched, so check_clauses.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_clauses.py: 2 required clauses missing — Governing Law and Return of Materials. Adding a Governing Law section naming the governing jurisdiction, and a Return of Materials section requiring return or destruction of Confidential Information at the end of the relationship. Not touching the checker or any existing clause.

actions.content:
# Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement

This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into by and
between the parties identified in the signature block below.

## Confidentiality

Each party agrees to hold the other party's Confidential Information in
strict confidence and to use it solely for the purpose of evaluating a
potential business relationship between the parties.

## Term

This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of two (2) years from
the Effective Date, unless earlier terminated by mutual written consent of
the parties.

## Governing Law

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the
laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of laws
principles. Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be brought
exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Delaware.

## Return of Materials

Upon the earlier of the termination of this Agreement or the written
request of the disclosing party, the receiving party shall promptly
return or destroy all documents, materials, and other tangible
embodiments of Confidential Information, together with all copies
thereof, and shall certify such return or destruction in writing if
requested.

## Permitted Disclosures

A party may disclose Confidential Information to its employees, officers,
and advisors who have a need to know such information, provided that such
persons are bound by confidentiality obligations no less protective than
those in this Agreement.

## Miscellaneous

This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding between the parties
with respect to its subject matter and supersedes all prior discussions.

interactions.notes: The fix — check_clauses.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
